name: pr_ag9_refocus_nonempty
drl:
rule F salience 10 when P($v : v) then drools.setFocus("a"); end
rule A1 agenda-group "a" salience 5 when P($v : v) then drools.setFocus("b"); end
rule A2 agenda-group "a" salience -5 when P($v : v) then end
rule B1 agenda-group "b" when P($v : v) then drools.setFocus("a"); end
rule B2 agenda-group "b" salience -3 when P($v : v) then end
